# `collapse` Function

Collapse a nested map into a flat map with path-based keys

Recursively flattens a nested map or object into a single-level map. Keys are joined with the separator. An optional depth limits how many levels are collapsed.

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
collapse(input dynamic, options dynamic...) dynamic
```

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `input` (Dynamic) The nested map or object to collapse.
<!-- variadic argument generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `options` (Variadic, Dynamic, Nullable) Optional arguments: a string sets the separator, a number sets the max depth. Both can be passed in any order. Defaults to provider separator and unlimited depth.

## Example Usage

### Flatten to leaf objects (auto-depth)

When no depth is specified, `collapse` stops at objects whose values are all primitives — the natural "leaf" level of your structure.

```terraform
locals {
  services = {
    dev = {
      api = { port = 8080, secure = false }
      web = { port = 443,  secure = true  }
    }
    prod = {
      api = { port = 8080, secure = true }
      web = { port = 443,  secure = true }
    }
  }
}

output "services_flat" {
  value = provider::util::collapse(local.services)
}
# Result:
# {
#   "dev/api"  = { port = 8080, secure = false }
#   "dev/web"  = { port = 443,  secure = true  }
#   "prod/api" = { port = 8080, secure = true  }
#   "prod/web" = { port = 443,  secure = true  }
# }
```

### Flatten N levels deep

Pass a number to limit how many levels are collapsed. Remaining nested structure is kept as-is.

```terraform
locals {
  config = {
    dev  = { db = { host = "localhost", port = 5432 } }
    prod = { db = { host = "db.prod",   port = 5432 } }
  }
}

output "two_levels" {
  value = provider::util::collapse(local.config, 2)
}
# Result: { "dev/db" = { host = "localhost", port = 5432 }, "prod/db" = { host = "db.prod", port = 5432 } }
```

### Custom separator

Pass a string to change the key separator (default comes from the provider configuration).

```terraform
locals {
  tags = {
    team = {
      backend  = { cost_center = "eng-01" }
      frontend = { cost_center = "eng-02" }
    }
  }
}

output "dot_separated" {
  value = provider::util::collapse(local.tags, ".")
}
# Result: { "team.backend" = {...}, "team.frontend" = {...} }
```
